steps.title: Use zero product property
steps.content:
The product equals $0$, so at least one factor must equal $0$:
$$
3x+8=0
$$
$$
4x-3=0
$$

steps.title: Solve the factors
steps.content:
Solve the two linear equations separately:
$$
3x+8=0,\quad x=-\frac{8}{3}
$$
$$
4x-3=0,\quad x=\frac{3}{4}
$$

steps.title: Match a listed solution
steps.content: Compare the choices with the two values found from the factors. The listed matching value is $-\frac{8}{3}$. The answer is A.
